title: main: give a pointer to install the policy

comments.body: @runcom Should this be closed or merged?
I think this  is mergeable, @mtrmac? This also needs a rebase I guess

https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/222#discussion_r81578632 ; we should either be able to distinguish between a production / development environment and only point to `make install` in development, or we can just close this and rely on RPM packaging for production and keep the local development a bit painful. I don’t really have a preference between these two alternatives, but I would prefer not printing a `Install the default-policy.json from the source repo` message in RPM builds.
rebased and updated the message to not refer to the source repo, but just an expected path.
@vbatts Looks like you need a rebase.

I still think “Install … from the source repo” is not the best thing to say for packaged deployments, but if @runcom likes this, I can live with that.

(Looking into the macOS test failures.)
This PR has not been looked at in almost a year, can I close?
